name: Title Guarantee, Inc. Title Insurance Company
description_short: Title insurance agent and real property research firm serving NY, NJ, CT, and DE with title searches, lien reviews, and closing services.
description_long:
Title Guarantee, Inc. (TGI) is a licensed title insurance agent and real property research organization headquartered at 39 Broadway in New York's financial district. The company has been operating long enough to emphasize a 35-year track record of business experience and maintains relationships with major law firms, lenders, and government entities. TGI functions as a critical service provider in the mortgage and real estate transaction ecosystem rather than a direct lender.

The company offers comprehensive title-related services including property title searches, co-op lien searches and reviews, New York City ECB and DOB violation resolution, complete document transfer and filing services, and both commercial and residential title insurance policies. They issue policies for major carriers First American and Stewart, positioning themselves as an underwriting agent rather than a direct insurer. Their services span the entire contract-to-post-closing cycle, providing analytics and property history research to support negotiation and risk management during transactions.

TGI distinguishes itself through deep expertise in New York-specific properties and violations, particularly ECB (Environmental Control Board) and DOB (Department of Buildings) issues that are unique to NYC real estate. The company emphasizes responsive customer service, industry leadership, and a broad view of complete property history. They work directly with established law firms, government agencies including the NYC Economic Development Corporation, and institutional lenders like Stewart Lender Services and GSA-certified vendors.

The main caveat is that TGI is a supporting service provider in real estate transactions, not a direct lender or primary closing agent. Their value depends heavily on integration with attorneys, lenders, and title companies. The website provides limited information about specific pricing, turnaround times, or service level agreements. Geographic service is limited to four northeastern states (NY, NJ, CT, DE), with clear emphasis on New York transactions.
pros: Serves all four states (NY, NJ, CT, DE) from single New York base with deep local expertise
Issues policies for two major national carriers (First American and Stewart), indicating regulatory compliance and market standing
Specializes in NYC-specific issues like ECB and DOB violations that require expert local knowledge
Works with major law firms and institutional lenders, demonstrating B2B credibility and transaction volume
Covers entire contract-to-post-closing cycle with integrated analytics and property history research
Co-op lien search expertise addresses unique NYC co-operative housing market needs
Licensed title insurance agent status confirms regulatory approval and fiduciary responsibility
cons: Website contains minimal information on pricing, service fees, or cost transparency for consumers
No stated turnaround times or service level agreements published for title searches or closing services
Geographic limitation to four states may not serve borrowers in other regions or multi-state transactions
Company functions as intermediary/agent rather than direct title insurer, limiting end-consumer direct relationship
Website lacks detailed FAQ, service comparison, or clear articulation of what distinguishes them from competitors in pricing or speed
best_for: Real estate attorneys and law firms handling closings in NY, NJ, CT, or Delaware
Mortgage lenders and servicers needing title underwriting agents and policy issuance
NYC property buyers and sellers dealing with co-op purchases or ECB/DOB violations
diagnosis: Title Guarantee, Inc. is best for real estate attorneys, mortgage lenders, and NYC-based property buyers/sellers who need specialized title services, particularly those dealing with co-op purchases or regulatory violations. The main caveat is that TGI is a B2B service provider and underwriting agent, not a direct lender or title insurer—consumers typically interact with them through their attorney or lender rather than directly.
services: New York City ECB violation resolution
New York City DOB violation resolution
Title insurance agent services for First American
Title insurance agent services for Stewart
